assignments.name: Set_Fields_from_Existing_Exemption

value.stringValue: No exemption found with that reference
This is not a digitally assisted exemption
This Exemption is no longer in draft status

decisions.description: if they are not selectable then don't reassign a null value but use the value that was in var_AgentOrLandlord
decisions.name: Agent_or_Landlord_Selectable
decisions.label: Agent or Landlord Selectable

decisions.name: Check_Database_For_Existing_Exemption_Type_Link
decisions.label: Check Database For Existing Exemption Type Link

decisions.name: Check_User_Selection_For_Existing_Exemption_Type_Link

decisions.name: Delete_Unnecessary_Exemption_Links_Or_Not

decisions.label: Is there a UPRN to Search for EPC

rules.name: Back_from_Screen_11_Landlord_Address_Confirm
rules.label: Back from Screen 11 - Landlord Address Confirm

decisions.name: Send_Email_If_Local_Authority_Account_Exists
decisions.label: Send Email If Local Authority Account Exists

rules.name: Send_Email
rules.conditionLogic: (1 AND 2) AND ((3 AND 4 AND 5) OR ( 6 AND 7 AND 8))
rules.label: Send Email

rules.name: Address_Not_Correct_or_new_Account
rules.label: Address Not Correct or new Account

Flow.description: Screen Flow to Allow Assisted Digital Call Handlers to create an exemption for landlords/agents who cannot complete the steps online

formulas.name: fml_D02_AdditionalInformation
formulas.expression:
SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( {!Get_Exemption_Type_Labels.D02_AdditionalInformation}, ":", ":
" ), "-", "
-" ), "approved methodology and software program", "approved methodology and software program (opens in new tab)" ), "Find your local authority", "Find your local authority (opens in a new tab)." )

formulas.name: fml_D05_AdditionalInformation
formulas.expression:
SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( {!Get_Exemption_Type_Labels.D05_AdditionalInformation}, ":", ":
" ), "-", "
-" ), "approved methodology and software program", "approved methodology and software program (opens in new tab)" ), "Find your local authority", "Find your local authority (opens in a new tab)." )

formulas.name: fml_DeclarationInset
formulas.expression: "Do you want to register this exemption now?"&BR()& "If you register this exemption, you should send us your evidence within two weeks."&BR()& "After you send in your evidence, your local authority may contact you to ask further questions."

formulas.name: fml_epc_uprn_error_inset
formulas.expression: "There is a problem with your property address and we can't search for the energy performance certificate. You will need to send us a current valid EPC within 14 days or your Local Authority may issue compliance penalties. Details of what and how will be sent out to you at the end of this process."

formulas.name: fml_ExemptionSavedInset
formulas.expression: "You're exemption has been saved and you will need your reference number when you call back to complete this. Your reference is: "&{!rcd_Exemption.Ref_Number__c}

formulas.name: fml_exemptionsubmitted_InsetText
formulas.expression:
"Your exemption reference number is: "&{!rcd_Exemption.Ref_Number__c}& "
Your exemption has been registered but it is not valid until you have sent in your evidence."& "
Details of your exemption have been sent to you through your preferred method of communication."& "
Are you happy to take two minutes to give feedback on this service? [feedback link]"

formulas.name: fml_ExemptionTypeSelectionClashes
formulas.expression: IF(ISPICKVAL({!rcd_Exemption.PropertyType__c}, "Residential"), "0|1|You cannot select both High cost and All improvements made.", "")

formulas.name: fml_JSON_End_Letter
formulas.expression: "\"address_line_1\": \"" & SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( {!rcd_ADUserAccount.FirstName} & " " & {!rcd_ADUserAccount.LastName}, "\\","\\\\" ), "\"","\\\"" ), BR(),"\\n" ) & "\"," & "\"address_line_2\": \"" & SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( {!rcd_ADUserAccount.PersonMailingStreet} & ", " & {!rcd_ADUserAccount.PersonMailingCity}, "\\","\\\\" ), "\"","\\\"" ), BR(),"\\n" ) & "\"," & "\"address_line_3\": \"" & {!rcd_ADUserAccount.PersonMailingPostalCode} & "\"," & "\"address_line_4\": \"" & {!rcd_ADUserAccount.PersonMailingCountry} & "\"}"

formulas.name: fml_JSON_Start
formulas.expression: "{" & "\"full name\":\"" & SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( {!rcd_ADUserAccount.FirstName} & " " & {!rcd_ADUserAccount.LastName}, "\\","\\\\" ), "\"","\\\"" ), BR(),"\\n" ) & "\"," & "\"address\":\"" & SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( {!var_FullPropertyAddress}, "\\","\\\\" ), "\"","\\\"" ), BR(),"\\n" ) & "\"," & "\"" & "exemptioninfo" & "\": ["

formulas.name: fml_LandlordAddressesAvailableText
formulas.expression: IF({!var_NumberOfLandlordAddressesReturned} == 1, "1 address found for " & {!var_EnteredLandlordPostocde}, TEXT({!var_NumberOfLandlordAddressesReturned}) & " addresses found for " & {!var_EnteredLandlordPostocde})

formulas.name: fml_LandlordConfirmAddressInsetText
formulas.expression: "Is this the correct landlord address? " & {!rcd_Exemption.LandlordAddress__c} & IF(NOT(ISBLANK({!rcd_Exemption.LandlordCity__c})), ", " & {!rcd_Exemption.LandlordCity__c}, "") & IF(NOT(ISBLANK({!rcd_Exemption.LandlordCounty__c})), ", " & {!rcd_Exemption.LandlordCounty__c}, "") & IF(NOT(ISBLANK( {!rcd_Exemption.LandlordPostcode__c} )), ", " & {!rcd_Exemption.LandlordPostcode__c}, "")

formulas.name: fml_LocalAuthorityMultipleExemptionEmailJSON
formulas.expression: "{\"local_authority\": \"" & SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( {!GetLocalAuthorityAccount.Name}, "\\", "\\\\" ), "\"", "\\\"" ), BR(), "\\n" ) & "\", \"name\": \"" & SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( IF( ISPICKVAL({!rcd_ADUserAccount.Landlord_Type__c}, "Agent"), {!rcd_ADUserAccount.FirstName} & " " & {!rcd_ADUserAccount.LastName}, IF( ISBLANK({!rcd_Exemption.LandlordBusinessName__c}), {!rcd_Exemption.LandlordFirstName__c} & " " & {!rcd_Exemption.LandlordLastName__c}, {!rcd_Exemption.LandlordBusinessName__c} ) ), "\\", "\\\\" ), "\"", "\\\"" ), BR(), "\\n" ) & "\", \"domesticOrNonDomestic\": \"" & IF( ISPICKVAL({!rcd_Exemption.PropertyType__c}, "Residential"), "Residential", "Non-domestic" ) & "\", \"address\": \"" & SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( {!rcd_Exemption.PropertyAddress__c} & ", " & {!rcd_Exemption.PropertyCity__c} & ", " & IF( ISBLANK({!rcd_Exemption.PropertyCounty__c}), "", {!rcd_Exemption.PropertyCounty__c} & ", " ) & {!rcd_Exemption.PropertyPostcode__c} & ", ", "\\", "\\\\" ), "\"", "\\\"" ), BR(), "\\n" ) & "\", \"date\": \"" & TEXT(TODAY()) & "\", \"exemption_info\": \"" & {!var_LocalAuthorityMultipleExemptionRegisteredEmailInfo} & "\", \"url\": \"" & {!fml_LocalAuthorityExemptionURL} & "\"}"

formulas.name: fml_LocalAuthoritySingleExemptionEmailJSON
formulas.expression: "{\"local_authority\": \"" & SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( {!GetLocalAuthorityAccount.Name}, "\\", "\\\\" ), "\"", "\\\"" ), BR(), "\\n" ) & "\", \"name\": \"" & SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( IF( ISPICKVAL({!rcd_ADUserAccount.Landlord_Type__c}, "Agent"), {!rcd_ADUserAccount.FirstName} & " " & {!rcd_ADUserAccount.LastName}, IF( ISBLANK({!rcd_Exemption.LandlordBusinessName__c}), {!rcd_Exemption.LandlordFirstName__c} & " " & {!rcd_Exemption.LandlordLastName__c}, {!rcd_Exemption.LandlordBusinessName__c} ) ), "\\", "\\\\" ), "\"", "\\\"" ), BR(), "\\n" ) & "\", \"domesticOrNonDomestic\": \"" & IF( ISPICKVAL({!rcd_Exemption.PropertyType__c}, "Residential"), "Residential", "Non-domestic" ) & "\", \"address\": \"" & SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( {!rcd_Exemption.PropertyAddress__c} & ", " & {!rcd_Exemption.PropertyCity__c} & ", " & IF( ISBLANK({!rcd_Exemption.PropertyCounty__c}), "", {!rcd_Exemption.PropertyCounty__c} & ", " ) & {!rcd_Exemption.PropertyPostcode__c} & ", ", "\\", "\\\\" ), "\"", "\\\"" ), BR(), "\\n" ) & "\", \"exemption_info\": \"" & {!var_LocalAuthoritySingleExemptionRegisteredEmailInfo} & "\", \"date\": \"" & TEXT(TODAY()) & "\", \"url\": \"" & {!fml_LocalAuthorityExemptionURL} & "\"}"

formulas.name: fml_NoEPCInsetText
formulas.expression: "Sorry - Without an energy performance certificate we cannot continue with the exemption."

formulas.name: fml_PropertyAddressesAvailableText
formulas.expression: IF({!var_NumberOfPropertyAddressesReturned} == 1, "1 address found for " & {!var_EnteredPropertyPostcode}, TEXT({!var_NumberOfPropertyAddressesReturned}) & " addresses found for " & {!var_EnteredPropertyPostcode})

formulas.name: fml_PropertyTypeCheckInset
formulas.expression: "You have started registering a " & TEXT({!Get_Existing_Exemption.PropertyType__c}) & " exemption. Is this correct? (If no we will have to start again)"

formulas.name: fml_returningUserTypeInset
formulas.expression: IF( {!var_AgentOrLandlord} = "Agent", "You have previously stated that you are an agent. To create an exemption with you as the landlord we will need to create you a landlord account.", IF( {!var_AgentOrLandlord} = "Landlord", "You have previously stated that you are a landlord. To create an exemption with you as an agent we will need to create you an agent account.", "" ) )

formulas.name: fml_UserAddressesAvailableText
formulas.expression: IF( {!var_NumberOfUserAddressesReturned} == 1, "1 address found for " & {!var_EnteredUserPostcode}, TEXT({!var_NumberOfUserAddressesReturned}) & " addresses found for " & {!var_EnteredUserPostcode})

Flow.label: PRSE Assisted Digital Create Exemption

loops.name: Loop_over_Exemption_Children_to_Count_Them_and_Build_JSON_for_Notify
loops.label: Loop over Exemption Children to Count Them and Build JSON for Notify

loops.name: Loop_Through_Database_Exemption_Type_Links
loops.label: Loop Through Database Exemption Type Links

loops.name: Loop_through_each_Exemption_Type_Record
loops.label: Loop through each Exemption Type Record

loops.name: Loop_Through_Existing_Exemption_Type_Links_And_Get_Names
loops.label: Loop Through Existing Exemption Type Links And Get Names

recordLookups.name: Get_Exemption_Links_After_Insert_And_Delete
recordLookups.label: Get Exemption Links After Insert And Delete

recordLookups.name: Get_Updated_Exemption_Record_Before_Save_Screen
recordLookups.label: Get Updated Exemption Record Before Save Screen

recordUpdates.name: Update_User_Account_With_Communication_Preferences
recordUpdates.label: Update User Account With Communication Preferences

value.stringValue:
Draft exemption saved

Your draft exemption has been saved.
The reference number is: {!Get_Updated_Exemption_Record.Ref_Number__c}
Please make a note of this. If you do not finish registration on this call you can call back in the future with this number.

Select exemptions to register for this property

You can select more than one exemption.

If you select more than one exemption, you will need to supply evidence for each exemption.

Read our guidance on exemptions (opens in new tab) for:

  • more information about each exemption type
  • what evidence is required for each exemption
Which exemptions are you registering for this property?
Have you told me all the exemptions you want to register for this property?
Providing evidence for the exemptions
Evidence that needs to be submitted
How would you like us to communicate with you?
How would you like us to communicate with you?
If there is anything else you think we should know, you can tell us here. This will be sent to the local authority.
Caller has confirmed information is accurate
Have you registered an exemption before?
If yes: We can search for your account, via name, business name, email or phone number
Search by name, business name, phone or email
Do you want to continue a draft exemption?
If yes: Please tell me the reference number you were given for this draft.
Do you have an existing exemption reference number?
Why are you registering an exemption through this call line?
Other Reason for Calling Assisted Digital
Does the property you want to register an exemption for have a valid energy performance certificate
What type of property are you registering an exemption for?
This means any privately rented property that is a residential dwelling not used for commercial purposes.|This includes commercial and public sector buildings.
Property address problem - Cannot find UPRN
Are you the landlord or an agent for the landlord?
Is the landlord a business or an individual?

subflows.name: Get_Property_Address_By_Postcode_Subflow
subflows.label: Get Property Address By Postcode Subflow

value.stringValue: Selecting use the address will automatically search the energy performance certificate register for a valid energy performance certificate.
Postcode of the property you are registering the exemption for

variables.description: this is not used as an actual account, it is just used to get the details from the address sub-flow
variables.name: rcd_AccountForLandlordDetails

variables.description: Only to be used to input and output from PRSE_SearchAddressByPostcode
variables.name: rcd_AccountForPropertyDetails
